questions.1: I see myself as someone who loves discovering hidden places.
questions.2: I am fascinated by ancient history and artifacts.
questions.3: I prefer thrilling outdoor activities over museums.
questions.4: I enjoy taking pictures and documenting every detail.
questions.5: I seek experiences that connect me with local cultures.
questions.6: I find peace in exploring natural landscapes.
questions.7: I like my travel itinerary to be completely unplanned.
